utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan item by item: 1) health_coverage: present with costs (monthly_cost, additional_mental_component_cost, bundled_option_cost) and details → fully specified. 2) property_coverage: present but marked available: false and no costs provided; the required format expects home/contents insurance with costs, so this is not fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: present with provider, details, and monthly_cost → fully specified. 4) additional_services: present but only details and note; no costs provided; the required format expects costs → not fully specified. 5) total_budget: present with complete monthly cost breakdown → fully specified.
